summary_draft: Brazil-origin cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2014 that later appears to have become inactive; current evidence is not yet strong enough to force a terminal dead-side classification.

evidence_notes: Current end-state evidence is tracker-driven, not yet a strong official closure notice.

event_candidates.title: Bleutrade launch
event_candidates.description: Bleutrade announced launch in March 2014 and positioned itself as a Brazil-origin multi-cryptocurrency exchange.

event_candidates.title: Site inaccessible / exchange flagged inactive
event_candidates.description: By March 2023, third-party exchange trackers reported that the website was inaccessible and flagged the venue as inactive or dead.

risks: closure may be dead-side but current evidence is too soft for a confident terminal record
later corporate geography moved beyond Brazil; origin and later base may need separate notes
final_notes: Keep Bleutrade conservative as inactive for now.
Next step: locate stronger archived official pages or preserved Bleutrade notices around the final inactive period.
